entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON (SOC)
entities.description: The organic form of carbon found in soil, used as an indicator of soil health and management effectiveness.

entities.name: SOIL INORGANIC CARBON (SIC)
entities.description: The inorganic form of carbon found in soil.

entities.name: TOTAL CARBON (TC)
entities.description: The sum of soil organic carbon and soil inorganic carbon.

entities.name: BLACK SOILS
entities.description: A type of soil characterized by high organic matter and shrink-swell properties, found in the semi-arid tropics of India.

entities.name: RED SOILS
entities.description: A type of soil found in the semi-arid tropics of India.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS (SAT)
entities.description: A climatic region characterized by low and irregular rainfall, specifically in India.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the benchmark spots for soil carbon estimation are located.

entities.name: MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural and land management practices adopted to maintain or increase soil carbon stocks.

entities.name: BULK DENSITY (BD)
entities.description: The mass of soil per unit volume, used to determine carbon stock thresholds.

entities.name: SHRINK-SWELL SOILS
entities.description: Soils that undergo significant volume changes during wetting and drying cycles, including black soils.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID AND ARID BIOCLIMATIC SYSTEMS
entities.description: Environmental conditions characterized by water scarcity that influence soil carbon dynamics.
